note: float32-aware rational fit (ridge-path + bit-polish, selected by true float32 error); exhaustive certs; factors are lower bounds (real-arith floor, wider interval, conservative for the polynomial); FDIV is Foundry-defined f64-quotient->f32, not IEEE f32 div
